title: Human Jerky
description: The Human Jerky mod is just a fun mod that adds a new food called Human Jerky. To get Human Jerky you combine steak and rotten flesh in a crafting table. Human Jerky give 1 more hunger and 0.1 more saturation than beef.
body: The Human Jerky mod is just a fun mod that adds a new food called Human Jerky. To get Human Jerky you combine steak and rotten flesh in a crafting table. Human Jerky give 1 more hunger and 0.1 more saturation than beef.
